_comment: Off-catalog but Glen-approved remedy / tool / service / therapy links for RemedyMatch auto-open. Grows organically. Keys are remedy/tool/service names; matching is case-insensitive (exact or substring, name length > 4). Value is a URL string, or an object {"url": "...", "note": "..."}. Catalog products do NOT go here — those resolve via product-aliases.json. Only add links you trust to open in a new tab.

E4L Bioenergetic Scan.note: Energy For Life 10-second voice scan / Biofield Analysis
